title: [codereview-pass1.2 security] rf_health.rs: fixed-point EMA must guard against overflow in diff calculation for extreme RSSI values
description: RSSI i16 <<16 can be close to i32::MIN/MAX edge cases (-32768<<16 or so). Although dBm range is -120 to 0, test with extremes. Consider using saturating ops. file: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs:21
